flooding_g10.content: G-10 mein pani bhar gaya hai, gaariyan phans gayi hain!
HEAVY RAIN WARNING: Severe thunderstorm cell active over Sector G-10 and G-11. Accumulation up to 60mm.
Traffic congestion alert: Vehicles stationary near G-10 Markaz outer ring due to deep water pooling.

flooding_georgetown.content: Flash flood happening at George Town for past 30 mins, drainage is fully blocked.
Cars stuck due to flood under George Town flyover. Water levels rising rapidly.
Heavy rainfall alert for George Town metropolitan corridor.
Traffic congestion spike detected around George Town main underpass.

accident_saddar.content: Saddar Metro Station Chowk pe gaariyon ki takkar hui hai, road completely block hai.
Accident anomaly: Murree Road Saddar corridor choked. Speed reduced to 5 km/h.
Caller reports 2-car collision near Saddar Commercial Plaza. Emergency crew dispatch requested.

heatwave.content: MET ADV_04: Extreme heatwave warning. Ambient temperature in metropolitan center peaking at 45.8C. Low humidity.
Severe heat in Saddar commercial center. People collapsing due to sunstroke. We need immediate cooling camps!
